leadText: Bacon (Japanese: やきベーコン Grilled Bacon) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V This very salty ingredient has been cooked just shy of charred, making it burst with fragrance and tasty flavor.
